sections.paragraph:
Original: קצה קצה

Transliteration: qâtseh qêtseh

Phonetic: kaw-tseh'

BDB Definition:

  1. end, extremity
    1. end, mouth, extremity
    2. border, outskirts
    3. the whole (condensed term for what is included within extremities)
    4. at the end of (a certain time)

Origin: from H7096

TWOT entry: 2053a,2053c

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
